articles.title: Wingman Friendly Cybersport 2026 Cup: Doctors' forfeit gambit and the DBV grudge match
articles.summary: Doctors threw a bracket match on purpose for a shot at revenge on DBV — then blew a 2-0 final lead against YSM anyway.

articles.title: sazhinfed joins Doctors as a young prospect
articles.summary: The 18-year-old rifler signs with Doctors' academy roster, already matching the team's all-time FACEIT rating record.
